hypothesis: If a cross-modal predictive framework trains two modalities to predict the third in a latent space (graph, text, and XRD) using L2 loss, VIC regularization, and contrastive losses on Matbench crystal-property tasks, then it will achieve lower MAE across Band Gap, Shear Modulus, Bulk Modulus, Dielectric, and Perovskites formation energy than established single-modality graph-based baselines (CGCNN, CoGN, ALIGNN).
